title: Heartopia
notes:
◆ Feature Updates and Optimizations ◆
[Hide & Seek Party]
A Hide & Seek Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can play as Mysterious Grimkin Hosts, who transform into furniture and hide, or as Investigative Journalists, who use the Survey Drone to find and capture them.

[Parkour Party]
A Parkour Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can use pillars, walls, and platforms to create obstacle courses and enjoy building challenges with others.

title: Coin Master
notes:
Thanks for playing Coin Master!

In this version, we’ve implemented bug fixes & performance improvements.

We have also implemented our new reward calendar feature - collect your daily rewards! 

Enjoy a world of fun, thrills, and huge rewards right at your fingertips. 

Invite your friends to play Coin Master & get your FREE REWARDS! We also recommend joining our community on Facebook, X, and Instagram for more fun & excitement.

title: Arena Breakout: Realistic FPS
notes:
[Map Updates]
[New Map: Valley: New Order]
       During the North-South Conflict, many of the Valley facilities once owned by the Antonio Family were left to decay. As Doss returned and gradually regained his footing, he started restoring these ruins... along with his family's glory.
       Doss has carried out a large-scale renovation and expansion of the Valley. Introducing the all-new [Valley: New Order]! The map area has been expanded by 47% and over 90% of it has been revamped. Several new

Leap into our latest update!
Meet Froggy Fu, our new zen Legendary booster. A lotus tile kicker that turns matches into big scores.

Greetings Governor,
We plan to update the game to version 1.1.08: Starlit Blaze on 【UTC 2026/6/3 06:00】. The servers will be down for an estimated 【3 hours】 during the update. We apologize for any inconvenience this might cause and will send you a reward as compensation once the update is complete.
